text: A healthy lifestyle is about more than just eating vegetables. It involves a balanced diet that includes fruits, proteins, and whole grains, along with regular exercise like walking or cycling. Equally important is getting enough sleep, ideally seven to nine hours each night, to help your body recover. Mental health also matters—taking time to relax or talk to friends can reduce stress. Finally, a good work-life balance is essential. Make time for hobbies and rest, not just work. When you combine these elements, you feel more energetic, focused, and happier every day.
